original_statement: which country placed first the most?
mutated_statement: which participant placed first the most and never placed first?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Logical contradiction addition: 'country' → 'participant' (country → participant) | appended negating clause "and never placed first" (placed first → placed first AND never placed first)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 基于judge_thought中可识别的关键信息（“Explanation: France has the most first-place finishes with 11 gold medals. Egypt and Tunisia have 0 gold medals”与评判标注“[Correct]”），agent 将变异问题的互斥子句当作两个独立子问题来回答：一边给出“最多第一名”为 France，另一边给出“从未第一名”为 Egypt 和 Tunisia。日志与评注均未指出或尝试解决“既最多又从未”的逻辑矛盾，也未主动询问澄清或将问题改写为可解形式。该行为表现为直接忽略矛盾部分，按可行子集完成任务，符合“无视所有矛盾指令”的定义。
